title: Prove no exterior scalar tail for zeta_residual
description: Dangerous form: zeta_tail = C_zeta/r. Required condition: C_zeta = 0 outside, or residual zeta is strictly non-metric / killed / compact-neutral. The sector must not leave a nonzero ordinary exterior 1/r scalar tail unless a future source-routing theorem explicitly routes it through the A-sector without double counting.
